Elon Musk.bio: Elon Musk is the wealthiest person in the world, with an estimated net worth of US$636 billion as of March 2026, according to the Bloomberg Billionaires Index, and $809 billion according to Forbes, primarily from his ownership stakes in SpaceX and Tesla.

Jeff Bezos.bio: Jeffrey Preston Bezos is an American businessman, the founder, executive chairman, and former president and CEO of Amazon, the world's largest e-commerce and cloud computing company.

Bernard Arnault.bio: Bernard Jean Étienne Arnault is a French businessman. He is the chairman and chief executive officer of LVMH, the world's largest luxury goods company.

Mark Zuckerberg.bio: Mark Elliot Zuckerberg is an American businessman and programmer who co-founded the social media service Facebook and its parent company Meta Platforms.

Larry Ellison.bio: Lawrence Joseph Ellison is an American businessman. He co-founded the software company Oracle Corporation, and was its CEO from 1977 to 2014.

Warren Buffett.bio: Warren Edward Buffett is an American investor and philanthropist who is the chairman and former CEO of the conglomerate Berkshire Hathaway.

Bill Gates.bio: William Henry Gates III is an American businessman and philanthropist. A pioneer of the microcomputer revolution of the 1970s and 1980s, he co-founded the software company Microsoft in 1975 with his childhood friend Paul Allen.

Steve Ballmer.bio: Steven Anthony Ballmer is an American businessman and investor who was the chief executive officer of Microsoft from 2000 to 2014.

Mukesh Ambani.bio: Mukesh Dhirubhai Ambani is an Indian businessman. He is the chairman and managing director of Reliance Industries, the largest public company in India by market capitalisation in 2025.

Larry Page.bio: Lawrence Edward Page is an American businessman and computer scientist who co-founded Google with Sergey Brin.

Sergey Brin.bio: Sergey Mikhailovich Brin is an American computer scientist and businessman who co-founded Google with Larry Page.

Michael Bloomberg.bio: Michael Rubens Bloomberg is an American businessman and politician. He is the majority owner and co-founder of Bloomberg L.P., and was its CEO from 1981 to 2001, and again from 2014 to 2023.

Jensen Huang.bio: Jen-Hsun Huang, commonly anglicized as Jensen Huang, is a Taiwanese and American business executive, electrical engineer, and philanthropist who is the founder, president, and chief executive officer (CEO) of Nvidia, the world's largest company by market capitalization.

Carlos Slim.bio: Carlos Slim Helú is a Mexican business oligarch, investor and philanthropist. From 2010 to 2013, Slim was ranked as the richest person in the world by Forbes business magazine.

Francoise Bettencourt Meyers.bio: Françoise Bettencourt Meyers is a French entrepreneur, philanthropist, writer, billionaire heiress.

Amancio Ortega.bio: Amancio Ortega Gaona OMC is a Spanish billionaire businessman. He is the founder and former chairman of Inditex fashion group, best known for its chains of Zara and Bershka clothing and accessories shops.

Jim Walton.bio: James Carr Walton is an American businessman, currently an heir to the fortune of Walmart, the world's largest retailer.

Rob Walton.bio: Samuel Robson "Rob" Walton (born October 27, 1944) is an American billionaire heir to the fortune of Walmart, the world's largest retailer.

Alice Walton.bio: Alice Louise Walton is an American billionaire and, as the daughter of Sam Walton, heiress to the fortune of Walmart.

Michael Dell.bio: Michael Saul Dell is an American billionaire businessman and investor. He is the founder, chairman, and CEO of Dell Technologies, one of the world's largest technology infrastructure companies.

Charles Koch.bio: Charles de Ganahl Koch is an American businessman and engineer. As of May 2025, he is ranked as the 22nd richest man in the world on the Bloomberg Billionaires Index, with an estimated net worth of US$71.4 billion.

Julia Koch.bio: Julia Margaret Flesher Koch is an American socialite and philanthropist who is one of the richest women in the world. As of May 2025, her fortune was over $74.2 billion.

Zhong Shanshan.bio: Zhong Shanshan is a Chinese business magnate and billionaire. He is the founder and chairperson of the Nongfu Spring beverage company and majority owner of Beijing Wantai Biological Pharmacy Enterprise.

Phil Knight.bio: Philip Hampson Knight is an American billionaire businessman who is the co-founder and chairman emeritus of Nike, Inc., a global sports equipment and apparel company.

Gautam Adani.bio: Gautam Shantilal Adani is an Indian billionaire businessman who is the founder and chairman of the Adani Group, a multinational conglomerate involved in port development and operations in India.

Ma Huateng.bio: Ma Huateng is #33 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list. Read more about Ma Huateng, their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

Jack Ma.bio: Ma Yun, also known as Jack Ma, is a Chinese businessman and philanthropist. He is the founder of the Jack Ma Foundation, and co-founder of Alibaba Group and Yunfeng Capital.

Zhang Yiming.bio: Zhang Yiming is a Chinese Internet entrepreneur. He founded ByteDance in 2012, developed the news aggregator Toutiao and the video sharing platform Douyin.

David Thomson.bio: David Kenneth Roy Thomson, 3rd Baron Thomson of Fleet (born 12 June 1957), is a Canadian and British hereditary peer and media magnate.

Dieter Schwarz.bio: Dieter Schwarz is a German billionaire businessman, and owner of the Schwarz-Gruppe.

Giovanni Ferrero.bio: Giovanni Ferrero is an Italian billionaire businessman. He assumed the leadership of the confectionery company Ferrero SpA after the death of his brother Pietro Ferrero in 2011.

Tadashi Yanai.bio: Tadashi Yanai is a Japanese billionaire businessman and the founder and president of Fast Retailing, the parent company of Uniqlo.

Len Blavatnik.bio: Sir Leonard Blavatnik is a Soviet-born British-American businessman and philanthropist. As of April 2025, Forbes estimated his net worth at $26.5 billion, ranking him the 75th-richest person in the world.

Takemitsu Takizaki.bio: Takemitsu Takizaki is a Japanese billionaire businessman, honorary chairman and founder of Keyence, a Japanese manufacturer of automation sensors, vision systems, barcode readers, laser markers, measuring instruments, and digital microscopes.

Stephen Schwarzman.bio: Stephen Allen Schwarzman (born February 14, 1947) is an American businessman. He is the chairman and CEO of the private equity firm Blackstone Inc., which he established in 1985 with Peter G.

Ken Griffin.bio: Kenneth Cordele Griffin (born October 15, 1968) is an American hedge fund manager, entrepreneur and investor.

Masayoshi Son.bio: Masayoshi Son is a Japanese entrepreneur, investor, and philanthropist.

Li Ka-shing.bio: Sir Ka-shing Li is a Hong Kong billionaire business magnate, investor, and philanthropist. He previously served as chairman of CK Hutchison Holdings and CK Asset Holdings, before retiring from those roles in May 2018.

Rupert Murdoch.bio: Keith Rupert Murdoch is an Australian and American former business magnate, investor, and media mogul.

Lee Shau-kee.bio: Lee Shau-kee was a Hong Kong business magnate, investor and philanthropist. He was a real estate tycoon and majority owner of Henderson Land Development, a property conglomerate with interests in property, hotels, restaurants and internet services in Hong Kong and other countries.

Alain Wertheimer.bio: Alain Ernest Wertheimer is a French billionaire businessman, based in New York City. He is the chairman and a controlling shareholder in Chanel, with his brother Gérard who chairs its watch division.

Gerard Wertheimer.bio: Gérard Paul Philippe Wertheimer is a French billionaire businessman based in New York City and Geneva, who owns Chanel in partnership with his brother, Alain. As of October 2022, Wertheimer's net worth was estimated at US$40 billion by Bloomberg Billionaires Index, making him the 27th richest person in the world.

Jacqueline Mars.bio: Jacqueline Mars is an American heiress and investor.

John Mars.bio: John Franklyn Mars (born October 15, 1935) is an American businessman and heir. He is the chairman of Mars, Inc. As of May 2025, Bloomberg Billionaires Index estimated his net worth at US$44.6 billion, ranking him the 33rd-richest person in the world.

Klaus-Michael Kuehne.bio: Klaus-Michael Kuehne is #47 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list. Read more about Klaus-Michael Kuehne, their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

Miriam Adelson.bio: Miriam Adelson is an Israeli-American physician, businesswoman, philanthropist, and conservative political donor. She was married to Sheldon Adelson until his death in 2021.

William Ding.bio: William Ding is #55 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list. Read more about William Ding, their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

Colin Zheng Huang.bio: Colin Huang is #58 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list. Read more about Colin Huang, their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

Thomas Peterffy.bio: Thomas Peterffy is a Hungarian-born American billionaire businessman. He is the founder, chairman and the largest shareholder of Interactive Brokers.

Susanne Klatten.bio: Susanne Hanna Ursula Klatten is a German billionaire heiress, the daughter of Herbert and Johanna Quandt.

Ray Dalio.bio: Raymond Thomas Dalio is an American billionaire and founder of one of the world's largest hedge funds, Bridgewater Associates.

MacKenzie Scott.bio: MacKenzie Scott is an American novelist, philanthropist, and early contributor to Amazon. She was married to Jeff Bezos, the co-founder of Amazon, from 1993 to 2019.

George Soros.bio: George Soros is a Hungarian-American investor and philanthropist. As of May 2025, he has a net worth of US$7.2 billion, having donated more than $32 billion to the Open Society Foundations, of which $15 billion has already been distributed, representing 64% of his original fortune.

Abigail Johnson.bio: Abigail Pierrepont Johnson is an American billionaire businesswoman, heiress and chief executive of Fidelity Investments.

Robin Zeng.bio: Robin Zeng Yuqun is a Chinese billionaire businessman. He is the founder and chairman of the battery manufacturer CATL, and a vice chairman of the All-China Federation of Industry and Commerce.

Li Shufu.bio: Eric Li Shufu is a Chinese billionaire entrepreneur. He is the founder and chairman of Geely.

Shiv Nadar.bio: Shiv Nadar is an Indian billionaire businessman and philanthropist. He is the founder and chairman of HCL Technologies, and is chairman of the Shiv Nadar Foundation.

Lakshmi Mittal.bio: Lakshmi Niwas Mittal is an Indian billionaire businessman and steel magnate. He is the executive chairman of ArcelorMittal, the world's second largest steelmaking company, as well as chairman of stainless steel manufacturer Aperam.

He Xiangjian.bio: He Xiangjian is the co-founder of Midea, one of China's largest appliance makers.

Stefan Quandt.bio: Stefan Quandt is a German billionaire heir, engineer and industrialist. As of December 2024, Forbes estimated his net worth at US$21.6 billion, ranked at number 89 on Bloomberg Billionaires Index.

Wang Chuanfu.bio: Wang Chuanfu is a Chinese chemist, billionaire entrepreneur, and the founder, chairman and CEO of the BYD Company.

Peter Woo.bio: Peter Woo Kwong-ching, GBM, GBS, JP is a Hong Kong billionaire businessman. He was the chairman of Wheelock and Company and The Wharf (Holdings) until 19 May 2015.

Dietrich Mateschitz.bio: Dietrich Markwart Eberhart Mateschitz was an Austrian entrepreneur. He was the co-founder and 49% owner of Red Bull GmbH.

Azim Premji.bio: Azim Hashim Premji is an Indian billionaire businessman and philanthropist, who was the chairman of Wipro.

Wang Wei.bio: Wang Wei (Chinese: 王卫; pinyin: Wáng Wèi; born October 1970), also known as Dick Wang, is a Chinese billionaire entrepreneur, who is the founder and chairman of SF Express, a Shenzhen-based multinational delivery services and logistics company.

Pang Kang.bio: Pang Kang is a Chinese billionaire businessman, and the chairman of Foshan Haitian Flavouring & Food Co.

Richard Branson.bio: Sir Richard Charles Nicholas Branson is an English business magnate who co-founded the Virgin Group in 1970, and, as of 2016, controlled five companies.

Jack Dorsey.bio: Jack Patrick Dorsey is an American businessman, co-founder of Twitter, Inc. and CEO during 2007–2008 and 2015–2021, as well as co-founder, principal executive officer and chairman of Block, Inc. and founder of Bluesky.

Brian Chesky.bio: Brian Joseph Chesky is an American businessman and industrial designer and the co-founder and CEO of Airbnb.

Lei Jun.bio: Lei Jun is a Chinese billionaire entrepreneur and computer engineer. He is known for being the founder, chairman, and CEO of the consumer electronics company Xiaomi.

Dhanin Chearavanont.bio: Dhanin Chearavanont, known in Chinese as Xie Guomin, or Chia Kok Min in Teochew, is a Thai businessman and entrepreneur. He is the senior chairman of Charoen Pokphand, Thailand's largest private company.

Charlene de Carvalho-Heineken.bio: Charlene Lucille de Carvalho-Heineken is a Dutch billionaire businesswoman, and the owner of a 25% controlling interest in the world's second-largest brewer, Heineken N.V.

Gina Rinehart.bio: Georgina Hope Rinehart is an Australian billionaire mining magnate and businesswoman.

Andrew Forrest.bio: John Andrew Henry Forrest, nicknamed Twiggy, is an Australian businessman. He is best known as the founder and current executive chairman of mining company Fortescue, one of Australia's largest companies.

Nicky Oppenheimer.bio: Nicholas "Nicky" Frank Oppenheimer is a South African billionaire businessman. He was formerly the chairman of De Beers diamond mining company and of its subsidiary, the Diamond Trading Company, and former deputy chairman of Anglo American.

Johann Rupert.bio: Johann Peter Rupert is a South African billionaire businessman, who is the eldest son of business tycoon Anton Rupert and his wife Huberte. He is the chairman of the Swiss-based luxury goods company Richemont and the South Africa-based company Remgro.

Chung Mong-koo.bio: Chung Mong-koo is a South Korean business magnate. He is the honorary chairman and former CEO of Hyundai Motor Group, Korea's second largest chaebol that manages 54 subsidiaries including Hyundai Motor, Kia Motors, and Hyundai Steel.

Kim Beom-su.bio: Kim Beom-su is #852 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list. Read more about Kim Beom-su, their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

Seo Jung-jin.bio: Seo Jung-jin (Korean: 서정진) can refer to these people: Seo Jung-jin (businessman), South Korean businessman and chairman of Celltrion Seo Jung-jin (footballer), South Korean footballer

Jay Y. Lee.bio: Jay Y. Lee is #95 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list.

Bang Si-hyuk.bio: Bang Si-hyuk, also known as "Hitman" Bang, is a South Korean music executive, record producer and songwriter who is the co-founder of JYP Entertainment, founder of record label Big Hit Music, and chairman of HYBE Corporation.

Kwon Hyuk-bin.bio: Kwon Hyuk-bin is a South Korean businessman, investor, and philanthropist. He is a billionaire who founded South Korea's third-largest gaming company Smilegate, in 2002.

Kim Jung-ju.bio: Kim Jung-ju, also known as Jay Kim, was a South Korean businessman, investor, and founder of Korea's largest gaming company, Nexon.

Chey Tae-won.bio: Chey Tae-won is a South Korean billionaire businessman and the chairman of SK Group, the country's second largest conglomerate, that includes 186 subsidiaries such as SK Telecom, SK Hynix, and SK Innovation.

Shin Dong-bin.bio: Shin Dong-bin is a South Korean business executive, and the chairman of Lotte Corporation since 2011.

Patrick Drahi.bio: Patrick Drahi is a French–Israeli billionaire magnate and investor with interests in media and telecoms.

Francois Pinault.bio: François Henri Joseph Pinault is a French billionaire businessman, founder of the luxury group Kering and the investment holding company Groupe Artémis.

Iris Fontbona.bio: Iris Balbina Fontbona González is a Chilean mining magnate, media proprietor, billionaire businesswoman, and the widow of Andrónico Luksic Abaroa, from whom she inherited Antofagasta PLC.

Peter Thiel.bio: Peter Andreas Thiel is a German and American entrepreneur, venture capitalist, and conservative political activist. A co-founder of PayPal (1998), Palantir Technologies (2003), and Founders Fund (2005), he was also the first outside investor in Facebook (2004).

Reed Hastings.bio: Wilmot Reed Hastings Jr. is an American billionaire businessman. He is the co-founder and chairman of Netflix, Inc., which provides the Netflix streaming service.

Marc Benioff.bio: Marc Russell Benioff is an American internet entrepreneur and philanthropist. He is best known as the co-founder, chairman and CEO of the software company Salesforce, as well as being the owner of Time magazine since 2018.

Travis Kalanick.bio: Travis Cordell Kalanick is an American businessman best known as the co-founder and former chief executive officer (CEO) of Uber.

Evan Spiegel.bio: Evan Thomas Spiegel is an American and French businessman who is the co-founder and CEO of Snap Inc. Spiegel was the youngest billionaire in the world in 2015.

Bobby Murphy.bio: Robert Cornelius Murphy is an American Internet entrepreneur and software engineer.

Sam Altman.bio: Samuel Harris Altman is an American businessman and entrepreneur who has been the chief executive officer (CEO) of the artificial intelligence research organization OpenAI since 2019.

Liu Qiangdong.bio: Liu Qiangdong (Richard) (Chinese: 刘强东; born March 10, 1973) is a Chinese Internet entrepreneur. Liu founded JD Multimedia as a business-to-consumer single retail store for magneto-optical products in June 1998 and later moved the company into an e-commerce website known as JD.com (also known as Jingdong) in 2013.

Wang Xing.bio: Wang Xing is a Chinese businessman, who co-founded Meituan and has been serving as chief executive officer of Meituan since January 2010.

Su Hua.bio: Su Hua is a Chinese billionaire internet entrepreneur. He is the co-founder and CEO of the video platform Kuaishou, which is known outside of China under the name Kwai.

Oprah Winfrey.bio: Oprah Gail Winfrey is an American talk show host, television producer, actress, author, and media proprietor.

Giorgio Armani.bio: Giorgio Armani was an Italian fashion designer and founder of the Armani luxury fashion house.

Ralph Lauren.bio: Ralph Lauren is an American fashion designer, philanthropist, and billionaire businessman, best known for founding the brand Ralph Lauren, a global multibillion-dollar enterprise.

Leonardo Del Vecchio.bio: Leonardo Del Vecchio was an Italian billionaire businessman, the founder and chairman of Luxottica, the world's largest producer and retailer of glasses and frames, with 77,734 employees and over 8,000 stores.

Reinhold Wuerth.bio: Reinhold Wuerth & family is #75 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list. Read more about Reinhold Wuerth & family, their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

Hasso Plattner.bio: Hasso Plattner is a German businessman who is the co-founder of SAP SE software company.

Daniel Ek.bio: Daniel Georg Ek is a Swedish businessman and technologist. He is the founder and executive chairman of Spotify.

Dustin Moskovitz.bio: Dustin Aaron Moskovitz is an American internet entrepreneur who co-founded the social media service Facebook and its parent company Meta Platforms with Mark Zuckerberg, Eduardo Saverin, Andrew McCollum and Chris Hughes.

Eduardo Saverin.bio: Eduardo Luiz Saverin is a Brazilian entrepreneur, angel investor, and philanthropist, known for co-founding Facebook.

Sean Parker.bio: Sean Parker is an American entrepreneur and philanthropist, most notable for co-founding the file-sharing computer service Napster, and was the first president of the social networking website Facebook.

Meg Whitman.bio: Margaret Cushing Whitman is an American business executive, diplomat and politician. She served as the United States Ambassador to Kenya from July 2022 to November 2024 under the Presidency of Joe Biden.

Marissa Mayer.bio: Marissa Ann Mayer is an American business executive, software engineer, and investor who served as president and chief executive officer of Yahoo! from 2012 to 2017, when it was sold to Verizon.

Eric Schmidt.bio: Eric Emerson Schmidt is an American businessman and former computer engineer who was the chief executive officer of Google from 2001 to 2011 and the company's executive chairman from 2011 to 2015.

Tim Cook.bio: Timothy Donald Cook is an American business executive who has been the chief executive officer (CEO) of Apple since 2011.

Satya Nadella.bio: Satya Narayana Nadella is an American business executive. He is the chairman and chief executive officer (CEO) of Microsoft, succeeding Steve Ballmer in 2014 as CEO and John W.

Sundar Pichai.bio: Pichai Sundararajan, better known as Sundar Pichai, is an Indian–American business executive who has been the CEO of Google since 2015 and the CEO of its parent company Alphabet Inc. since 2019.

Jamie Dimon.bio: James Dimon is an American businessman who has been the chairman and chief executive officer (CEO) of JPMorgan Chase since 2006.

Carl Icahn.bio: Carl Celian Icahn is an American businessman and investor. He is the founder and controlling shareholder of Icahn Enterprises, a public company and diversified conglomerate holding company based in Sunny Isles Beach, Florida.

George Lucas.bio: George Walton Lucas Jr. is an American filmmaker and philanthropist. He created the Star Wars franchise and its fictional universe, the Indiana Jones franchise, and founded Lucasfilm, LucasArts, Industrial Light & Magic and THX.

Steven Spielberg.bio: Steven Allan Spielberg is an American filmmaker. A major figure of the New Hollywood era and pioneer of the modern blockbuster, Spielberg is widely regarded as one of the greatest and most influential filmmakers in the history of cinema and is the highest-grossing film director of all time.

David Geffen.bio: David Lawrence Geffen is an American film producer, record executive, and media proprietor.

Patrick Collison.bio: Patrick Collison is an Irish entrepreneur. He is the chief executive officer of Stripe, which he co-founded with his younger brother, John, in 2010.

John Collison.bio: John Collison is an Irish-American entrepreneur. He is the president of Stripe, which he co-founded in 2010 with his brother Patrick.

Jan Koum.bio: Jan Borysovych Koum is an American billionaire businessman and computer programmer. He is the co-founder and former CEO of WhatsApp, a mobile messaging app which was acquired by Facebook in 2014 for US$19.3 billion.

Tony Xu.bio: Tony Xu is an American billionaire businessman and the co-founder and CEO of DoorDash.

Stewart Butterfield.bio: Daniel Stewart Butterfield is a Canadian billionaire businessman, best known for co-founding the photo-sharing website Flickr and the team-messaging application Slack.

Drew Houston.bio: Andrew W. Houston is an American Internet entrepreneur best known as the co-founder and CEO of Dropbox, an online backup and storage service.

Robert Kuok.bio: Robert Kuok Hock Nien, better known as Robert Kuok, is a Malaysian business magnate, investor and philanthropist based in Hong Kong since 1973. According to Forbes, his net worth is estimated at $11.8 billion as of April 2023, making him the wealthiest Malaysian citizen and 96th wealthiest person in the world.

Li Xiting.bio: Li Xiting is a Chinese-born Singaporean billionaire business magnate. He is the co-founder, president of Mindray, China's largest medical equipment manufacturer.

Ren Zhengfei.bio: Ren Zhengfei is a Chinese entrepreneur and engineer who is the founder and CEO of Huawei Technologies, which is located in Shenzhen, China, and is the world's largest manufacturer of telecommunications equipment and second largest manufacturer of smartphones and Huawei Chinese Electric Cars.

Lee Kun-hee.bio: Lee Kun-hee was a South Korean businessman who served as the chairman of Samsung from 1987 to 2008 and from 2010 to his death in 2020.

Lee Boo-jin.bio: Lee Boo-jin is a South Korean businesswoman who has served as president and chief executive of one of Seoul's leading hotels and conference centers, Hotel Shilla, since 2010.

Robert Kraft.bio: Robert Hearth Kenneth Kraft is an American billionaire businessman. He is the chairman and chief executive officer (CEO) of the Kraft Group, a diversified holding company with assets in paper and packaging, sports and entertainment, real estate development, and a private equity portfolio.

Jerry Jones.bio: Jerral Wayne Jones Sr. is an American billionaire businessman who is the owner, president, and general manager of the Dallas Cowboys of the National Football League (NFL).

Steve Cohen.bio: Steven A. Cohen (born June 11, 1956) is an American hedge fund manager and owner of the New York Mets of Major League Baseball (MLB).

David Tepper.bio: David Alan Tepper is an American billionaire hedge fund manager, the founder and president of Appaloosa Management, a global hedge fund based in Miami Beach, Florida.

James Simons.bio: Jim Simons is #55 on Forbes' 2024 Billionaires list. Read more about Jim Simons, their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

John Paulson.bio: John Alfred Paulson is an American billionaire hedge fund manager. He leads Paulson & Co., a New York-based investment management firm he founded in 1994.

Paul Tudor Jones.bio: Paul Tudor Jones II is an American billionaire hedge fund manager. In 1980, he founded Tudor Investment Corporation, an asset management firm headquartered in Stamford, Connecticut.

Leon Black.bio: Leon David Black is an American private equity investor. He is the former CEO of Apollo Global Management, which he co-founded in 1990 with Marc Rowan and Josh Harris.

Henry Kravis.bio: Henry Roberts Kravis is an American businessman, investor, and philanthropist. He is a co-founder of the private equity and investment firm Kohlberg Kravis Roberts & Co.

Tilman Fertitta.bio: Tilman Joseph Fertitta is an American diplomat, businessman and television personality. He serves as the United States ambassador to Italy and San Marino since May 2025.

Harold Hamm.bio: Harold Glenn Hamm is an American business magnate in the oil and gas business. He is known for pioneering fracking of shale oil resources.

Aerin Lauder.bio: Aerin Rebecca Lauder Zinterhofer is an American billionaire heiress and businesswoman.

Leonard Lauder.bio: Leonard Alan Lauder was an American billionaire, philanthropist and art collector. Together, he and his brother, Ronald Lauder, were the sole heirs to The Estée Lauder Companies cosmetics fortune, founded in 1946 by their parents, Estée and Joseph Lauder.

Mark Cuban.bio: Mark Cuban is an American businessman, entrepreneur, and television personality. He is the former principal owner and current minority owner of the Dallas Mavericks of the National Basketball Association (NBA) and co-owner of 2929 Entertainment.

Rihanna.bio: Robyn Rihanna Fenty is a Barbadian singer, businesswoman, and actress. An influential figure in popular culture, she is known for her multifaceted career, artistic reinventions, and eclectic fashion style.

Jay-Z.bio: Shawn Corey Carter, known professionally as Jay-Z, is an American rapper, businessman, and record executive. He was named the greatest rapper of all time by Billboard and Vibe in 2023.

Kanye West.bio: Ye is an American rapper, songwriter, and record producer. He has been listed among the greatest rappers of all time and referred to as one of the most prominent figures in hip-hop.

Aliko Dangote.bio: Aliko Mohammad Dangote is a Nigerian businessman known for his key roles in Dangote Group and Dangote Refinery.

Mike Adenuga.bio: Chief Michael Adeniyi Agbolade Ishola Adenuga Jr is a Nigerian billionaire businessman, and the fifth richest person in Africa according to Forbes. His company Globacom is Nigeria's second-largest telecom operator and also has a presence in Ghana and Benin.

Strive Masiyiwa.bio: Strive Masiyiwa is a London-based Zimbabwean billionaire businessman and philanthropist. He is the founder and executive chairman of international technology groups Econet Global and Cassava Technologies.

Patrice Motsepe.bio: Patrice Tlhopane Motsepe is a South African billionaire businessman and football administrator who has served as president of the Confederation of African Football (CAF) since 2021.

Abdulsamad Rabiu.bio: Abdulsamad Rabiu is #284 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list. Read more about Abdulsamad Rabiu, their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

Nassef Sawiris.bio: Nassef Onsi Sawiris is an Egyptian businessman, and the youngest of Onsi Sawiris' three sons. As of January 2026, his net worth was estimated at US$8.5 billion, making him the richest Egyptian.

Naguib Sawiris.bio: Naguib Onsi Sawiris is an Egyptian-American billionaire businessman. He is the chairman of Orascom Investment Holding and the former chairman and CEO of Orascom Telecom Holding.

Issad Rebrab.bio: Issad Rebrab is an Algerian billionaire businessman, CEO of the Cevital industrial group, the largest private company in Algeria, active in steel, food, agribusiness and electronics.

Femi Otedola.bio: Olufemi Peter Otedola is a Nigerian businessman and philanthropist. He is the former chairman of Forte Oil PLC, and former executive chairman of Geregu Power PLC.

Manu Chandaria.bio: Manilal Premchand Chandaria OBE CBS EBS is a Kenyan businessman of Indian descent who was born in Nairobi. He is a senior member of the Comcraft Group of Companies, that trades in about 40 countries, and is on the boards of several prominent East African companies.

Joseph Safra.bio: Joseph Safra was a Lebanese Brazilian banker and billionaire businessman of Syrian descent. He was Brazil's richest man and the richest banker in the world, running the Brazilian banking and investment empire, Safra Group.

Jorge Paulo Lemann.bio: Jorge Paulo Lemann is a Brazilian billionaire investment banker, businessman, and former tennis player with dual Brazilian and Swiss citizenship.

Marcel Herrmann Telles.bio: Marcel Herrmann Telles & family is #1504 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list. Read more about Marcel Herrmann Telles & family, their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

Eduardo Elsztain.bio: Eduardo Sergio Elsztain is an Argentine businessman involved in the real estate, financial, technology, and agribusiness sectors.

Luis Carlos Sarmiento.bio: Luis Carlos Sarmiento Angulo is a Colombian billionaire businessman and banker. His fortune derives primarily from the banking conglomerate Grupo Aval, of which he is the majority shareholder and chairman.

Ricardo Salinas Pliego.bio: Ricardo Benjamín Salinas Pliego is a Mexican business magnate, founder and chairman of Grupo Salinas, a corporate conglomerate with interests in telecommunications, media, financial services, and retail.

Eva Gonda de Rivera.bio: Eva Gonda de Rivera is a Mexican billionaire heiress and businesswoman. Along with her daughters, she owns a major stake in the FEMSA beverage corporation, which operates convenience stores and bottling plants across Mexico and Latin America.

Alberto Bailleres.bio: Alberto Baillères González was a Mexican billionaire businessman. As of 2021, he had an estimated net worth of US$10.1 billion according to Forbes.

Manuel Villar.bio: Manuel Villar is #1376 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list. Read more about Manuel Villar, their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

Henry Sy.bio: Henry Tan Chi Sieng Sy Sr. was a Filipino businessman.

Enrique Razon Jr.bio: Enrique Razon Jr. is #175 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list. Read more about Enrique Razon Jr., their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

Robert Budi Hartono.bio: Robert Budi Hartono is an Indonesian tobacco billionaire with a net worth of US$25.3 billion as of September 2023. He owns and runs the privately held Djarum, the world's third-largest maker of clove cigarettes.

Michael Hartono.bio: Michael Bambang Hartono (2 October 1939 – 19 March 2026) was an Indonesian billionaire heir and businessman.

Prajogo Pangestu.bio: Prajogo Pangestu, born Phang Djoen Phen is an Indonesian billionaire, business magnate, investor, and philanthropist. He is the founder of the Indonesian conglomerate Barito Pacific Group, which engages in forestry, plantations, oil and gas, coal, gold mining, and geothermal energy.

Sri Prakash Lohia.bio: Sri Prakash Lohia is an Indian-born Indonesian billionaire businessman, and the founder and chairman of Indorama Corporation, a diversified petrochemical and textile company.

Charoen Sirivadhanabhakdi.bio: Charoen Sirivadhanabhakdi is a Thai business magnate and investor.

Sarath Ratanavadi.bio: Sarath Ratanavadi is a Thai engineer and billionaire businessman who is the founder and chief executive officer of Gulf Development, which operates in sectors such as power generation, telecommunications, and digital infrastructure.

Quek Leng Chan.bio: Tan Sri Quek Leng Chan is a Malaysian tycoon who co-founded Hong Leong Group Malaysia.

Ananda Krishnan.bio: Tatparanandam Ananda Krishnan, also known by the initialism A. K., was a Malaysian entrepreneur who was a founder and chairperson of Usaha Tegas and founder of Yu Cai Foundation (YCF).

Kwek Leng Beng.bio: Kwek Leng Beng is a Singaporean businessman. He is the executive chairman of City Developments Limited (CDL) and Hong Leong Group Singapore, the latter being a diversified conglomerate founded by his father in 1941.

Zhang Zhidong.bio: Zhang Zhidong is #178 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list. Read more about Zhang Zhidong, their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

Yang Huiyan.bio: Yang Huiyan is a Chinese-born billionaire businesswoman and property developer. She is the chairwoman and the majority shareholder of Country Garden Holdings, a stake largely transferred to her by her father Yang Guoqiang in 2007.

Qin Yinglin.bio: Qin Yinglin is a Chinese agriculture tycoon, billionaire, Communist Party member, and the world's richest farmer. He is the Chair and president of the pig farming company Muyuan Foodstuff and is one of the richest people in China.

Fan Hongwei.bio: Fan Hongwei is a Chinese entrepreneur and billionaire who is the chair and CEO of the chemical fiber company Hengli Petrochemical (恒力石化) and vice chair of its holding company Hengli Group (恒力集团).

Guo Guangchang.bio: Guo Guangchang is a Chinese businessman and investor. He is the chairman and co-founder of Fosun International Limited, and a representative of the 12th Chinese People's Political Consultative Conference.

Xu Hang.bio: Xu Hang is a Chinese billionaire business magnate. He is the co-founder of the Shenzhen-based multinational medical instrumentation manufacturer Mindray Medical International.

Zhang Lei.bio: Zhang Lei (born 1972) is a Chinese investor and philanthropist. He is the founder and chairman of Hillhouse Investment, an Asia-focused private equity firm.

Sun Piaoyang.bio: Sun Piaoyang is a Chinese pharmaceutical executive and billionaire, the chairman of Jiangsu Hengrui Medicine.

Akio Nitori.bio: Akio Nitori is #1440 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list. Read more about Akio Nitori, their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

Hiroshi Mikitani.bio: Hiroshi Mikitani is a Japanese billionaire business magnate and writer. He is the founder and CEO of Rakuten, Inc. He is also the president of Crimson Group, chairman of the football club Vissel Kobe, chairman of Tokyo Philharmonic Orchestra, and a board member of Lyft.

Yusaku Maezawa.bio: Yusaku Maezawa is a Japanese billionaire entrepreneur, space tourist, and art collector. He founded Start Today in 1998 and launched the online fashion retail website Zozotown in 2004, now Japan's largest.

Vagit Alekperov.bio: Vagit Yusufovich Alekperov is a Russian businessman of Azerbaijani origin and an oligarch. He was the president of the oil company Lukoil from 1993 until 2022.

Vladimir Potanin.bio: Vladimir Olegovich Potanin is a Russian businessman, billionaire and statesman. He is the founder and president of Interros, which holds stakes in MMC Norilsk Nickel, Rosa Khutor, Rosbank, Yandex and TCS Group Holding.

Leonid Mikhelson.bio: Leonid Viktorovich Mikhelson is a Russian-Israeli billionaire oligarch, businessman, CEO, chairman and major shareholder of the Russian gas company Novatek.

Vladimir Lisin.bio: Vladimir Sergeyevich Lisin is a Russian billionaire businessman. He is the chairman and majority shareholder of Novolipetsk (NLMK), one of the four largest steel companies in Russia.

Alisher Usmanov.bio: Alisher Burkhanovich Usmanov is a Russian-Uzbek billionaire. Usmanov is the 149th richest person in the world according to Forbes, with a net worth of $16.8 billion, largely due to his stake in USM Holdings, in which Usmanov holds less than 50%.

Roman Abramovich.bio: Roman Arkadyevich Abramovich is a Russian business oligarch and politician. He is the former owner of Chelsea, a Premier League football club in London, England, and is the primary owner of the private investment company Millhouse.

Mikhail Fridman.bio: Mikhail Maratovich Fridman is a Ukrainian-born, Russian–Israeli tycoon and oligarch. He is one of the co-founders of Alfa-Group, a multinational Russian conglomerate.

German Khan.bio: German Borisovich Khan is a Ukrainian-Israeli-Russian oligarch, billionaire, and businessman. After graduating from university in 1988 he worked in a wholesale business selling consumer items, before setting up his own cooperative.

Petr Kellner.bio: Petr Kellner was a Czech entrepreneur, the founder and majority shareholder (98.93%) of the PPF Group.

Daniel Kretinsky.bio: Daniel Křetínský is a Czech billionaire businessman and lawyer, who is the chief executive officer (CEO) and 94% owner of Energetický a průmyslový holding (EPH), co-owner and president of football club Sparta Prague, and director and major shareholder of English football club West Ham United.

Rafaela Aponte-Diamant.bio: Rafaela Aponte-Diamant is an Italian-Israeli billionaire and a major shareholder of the Mediterranean Shipping Company (MSC) Group, along with her husband, Gianluigi Aponte.

Silvio Berlusconi.bio: Silvio Berlusconi was an Italian media tycoon and politician who served as the prime minister of Italy in three governments from 1994 to 1995, 2001 to 2006 and 2008 to 2011.

Miuccia Prada.bio: Miuccia Bianchi Prada is an Italian billionaire fashion designer and businesswoman.

Lakshmi Niwas Mittal.bio: Lakshmi Mittal is #70 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list. Read more about Lakshmi Mittal, their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

Kumar Birla.bio: Kumar Mangalam Birla (born 14 June 1967) is an Indian billionaire businessman. He is the chairman of the Aditya Birla Group, one of the largest conglomerates in India.

Dilip Shanghvi.bio: Dilip Shanghvi is an Indian billionaire businessman. Shanghvi is the founder of Sun Pharmaceuticals, a pharmaceutical company.

Cyrus Poonawalla.bio: Cyrus Soli Poonawalla (born 11 May 1941) is an Indian billionaire businessman, and the chairman and managing director of the Cyrus Poonawalla Group, which includes the Serum Institute of India, an Indian biotech company which is the largest vaccine manufacturer in the world, and Poonawalla Fincorp, a leading NBFC in India.

Uday Kotak.bio: Uday Suresh Kotak is an Indian banker and founder of Kotak Mahindra Bank, where he is a non-executive director.

Savitri Jindal.bio: Savitri Devi Jindal is an Indian businesswoman and politician. She is the chairperson emeritus of the O.P.

Radhakishan Damani.bio: Radhakishan Shivkishan Damani is an Indian billionaire businessman and investor. He is the founder and chairman of retail chain DMart.

Nandan Nilekani.bio: Nandan Mohanrao Nilekani is an Indian entrepreneur. He co-founded Infosys and is the non-executive chairman of Infosys replacing R Seshasayee and Ravi Venkatesan, who were the co-chairs of the board, on 24 August 2017.

N.R. Narayana Murthy.bio: N.R. Narayana Murthy is #1044 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list.

Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw.bio: Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw is an Indian billionaire entrepreneur. She is the executive chairperson and founder of Biocon Limited and Biocon Biologics Limited, a biotechnology company based in Bangalore, India and the former chairperson of Indian Institute of Management, Bangalore.

Pallonji Mistry.bio: Pallonji Shapoorji Mistry was an Indian-born Irish businessman. He was chairman of the Shapoorji Pallonji Group and a major shareholder of India's largest private conglomerate, Tata Group.

Byju Raveendran.bio: Byju Raveendran is an Indian entrepreneur, investor and educator who, with his wife Divya Gokulnath, co-founded Byju's.

Ritesh Agarwal.bio: Ritesh Agarwal is an Indian billionaire entrepreneur and the founder and CEO of PRISM, a hospitality chain.

Yuri Milner.bio: Yuri Borisovich (Bentsionovich) Milner is a Soviet-born, Israeli entrepreneur, investor, physicist and scientist. He is a co-founder and former chairperson of internet company Mail.Ru Group, and a founder of investment firm DST Global.

Pavel Durov.bio: Pavel Valeryevich Durov is a technology entrepreneur. He is best known as the chief executive officer (CEO) of Telegram.

Nicolas Puech.bio: Nicolas Puech is a French businessman who is a fifth-generation descendant of Thierry Hermès, the founder of luxury goods company Hermès.

Emmanuel Besnier.bio: Emmanuel Besnier is a French heir and billionaire businessman. He is the chief executive officer (CEO) and controlling shareholder of Lactalis.

Xavier Niel.bio: Xavier Niel is a French billionaire businessman. He is involved in the telecommunications and technology industry and is the founder and majority shareholder of the French Internet service provider and mobile operator Iliad trading under the Free brand.

Rodolphe Saade.bio: Rodolphe Saadé is a Franco-Lebanese businessman. He is the chairman of CMA CGM, a world leader in logistics transport, and the son of its founder, Jacques Saadé.

Ernesto Bertarelli.bio: Ernesto Silvio Maurizio Bertarelli is an Italian-born Swiss billionaire businessman and philanthropist.

Gianluigi Aponte.bio: Gianluigi Aponte is an Italian billionaire businessman, and the co-founder, co-owner and chairman of Mediterranean Shipping Company (MSC).

Kjeld Kirk Kristiansen.bio: Kjeld Kirk Kristiansen is a Danish businessman who was the president and chief executive officer of the Lego Group from 1979 to 2004.

Anders Holch Povlsen.bio: Anders Holch Povlsen is a Danish billionaire, CEO and sole owner of the international retail clothing chain Bestseller, a company founded by his parents.

Stefan Persson.bio: Carl Stefan Erling Persson (Swedish: [ˈstěːfan ˈpæ̌ːʂɔn]; born 4 October 1947) is a Swedish billionaire businessman. In 2022, Forbes reported Persson's net worth as $17 billion making him the richest of Sweden's 45 billionaires and the 98th richest person in the world.

Ingvar Kamprad.bio: Feodor Ingvar Kamprad was a Swedish billionaire businessman who founded IKEA in 1943 and grew it into a multinational retail company that became the world's largest furniture seller in 2008.

Kim Taek-jin.bio: Kim Taek-jin is a South Korean businessman and software engineer. He is co-chairman of video game developer NCSoft, the second largest video game company in the country.

Chung Euisun.bio: Euisun Chung is #430 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list. Read more about Euisun Chung, their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

Lee Myung-hee.bio: Lee Myung-hee is a South Korean business magnate and the chairwoman of the Shinsegae Group.

Hong Ra-hee.bio: Hong Ra-hee is a South Korean billionaire businesswoman who is the director of Leeum Museum of Art. She is the widow of Lee Kun-hee, who was the richest person in South Korea.

Koo Kwang-mo.bio: Koo Kwang-mo is a South Korean businessman. The chairman of LG, he is among the richest people in South Korea.

Lee Seo-hyun.bio: Lee Seo-hyun is a South Korean businesswoman and fashion designer who served as the president of Samsung C&T Corporation since April 2024.

Zhang Bangxin.bio: Zhang Bangxin or by the western name Tom, is a Chinese self-made billionaire, co-founder and the chairman of the U.S. listed education services firm TAL Education Group.

Brian Armstrong.bio: Brian Armstrong may refer to: Brian Armstrong, ring name used by Brian Girard James (born 1969), American professional wrestler better known by another ring name, Road Dogg Brian Armstrong (footballer), New Zealand international football (soccer) player Brian Armstrong (businessman), (born 1983), founder and CEO of Coinbase Brian Armstrong (American football), American college football coach

Changpeng Zhao.bio: Changpeng Zhao, commonly known as CZ, is a Canadian businessman who is known for co-founding cryptocurrency companies, such as Binance and Blockchain.com.

Vitalik Buterin.bio: Vitaly Dmitrievich Buterin, better known as Vitalik Buterin, is a Russian-Canadian computer programmer best known for co-founding Ethereum.

Reid Hoffman.bio: Reid Garrett Hoffman is an American Internet entrepreneur, venture capitalist, podcaster, and author. Hoffman is the co-founder and former executive chairman of LinkedIn, a business-oriented social network used primarily for professional networking.

Daniel Zhang.bio: Daniel Zhang Yong is a Chinese business executive who was the executive chairman and chief executive officer of Alibaba Group.

Pierre Omidyar.bio: Pierre Morad Omidyar is a French-born Iranian-American billionaire. A technology entrepreneur, software engineer, and philanthropist, he is the founder of eBay, where he served as chairman from 1998 to 2015.

Wang Jianlin.bio: Wang Jianlin is a Chinese business magnate, investor and philanthropist.

Ma Jianrong.bio: Ma Jianrong is a Chinese billionaire businessman in the textile industry, and the chairman of Shenzhou International Group Holdings Limited, a knitwear and garments manufacturer based in China.

Pan Zhengmin.bio: Pan Zhengmin is a Chinese entrepreneur, the co-founder of Shenzhen AAC Technologies, an electronic components company.

Wang Wenyin.bio: Wang Wenyin is a Chinese bilionaire businessman and the founder and chairman of Amer International Group, a privately held industrial conglomerate based in Shenzhen that focuses on non-ferrous metals, copper products, and cables.

Lu Guanqiu.bio: Lu Guanqiu was a Chinese billionaire entrepreneur, and the founder of Wanxiang Group.

Shi Yuzhu.bio: Shi Yuzhu is a Chinese entrepreneur and software engineer.

Liu Yonghao.bio: Liu Yonghao is a businessman in agribusiness in China. He is the founder and chairman of New Hope, the biggest animal feed producer in China.

Zong Qinghou.bio: Zong Qinghou was a Chinese billionaire businessman, and the founder, chairman and CEO of the Hangzhou Wahaha Group, China's leading beverage company.

Terry Gou.bio: Terry Gou is a Taiwanese billionaire businessman and politician. Gou is the founder and former chairman and chief executive officer (CEO) of Foxconn, the world's largest contract manufacturer of electronics.

Tsai Eng-meng.bio: Tsai Eng-meng is a Taiwanese businessman. He is best known for his leadership of the Want Want food company and his family's later acquisition of various news media companies in Taiwan.

Daniel Tsai.bio: Daniel Tsai is a Taiwanese billionaire businessman and lawyer. He and his brother Richard Tsai run Fubon Financial Holding Co., founded by their father Tsai Wan-tsai.

Barry Lam.bio: Lin Pai‑li, also known by his English name Barry Lam, is a Taiwanese billionaire business executive who is the founder and chairman of Quanta Computer.

Morris Chang.bio: Morris Chang Chung-mou is a Taiwanese billionaire business executive and electrical engineer. He is the founder of Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC) and was the company's chief executive officer (CEO) from 1987 to 2005, and its chairman until 2018.

Robert Ng.bio: Robert Ng Chee Siong is a Singaporean billionaire businessman, and the chairman of Hong Kong property development conglomerate Sino Group since 1991.

Goh Cheng Liang.bio: Goh Cheng Liang was a Singaporean billionaire businessman who founded Wuthelam Holdings, which manufactures paint and coatings.

Forrest Li.bio: Forrest Li Xiaodong is a Singaporean entrepreneur and billionaire. He is the founder, chairman and chief executive officer of Sea Limited, a Singapore tech company with subsidiaries including Garena, Shopee, and Monee.

Manny Pangilinan.bio: Manuel Velez Pangilinan, also known as Manny Pangilinan or by his initials MVP, is a Filipino businessman and sports patron. He is the managing director and CEO of First Pacific, a Hong Kong–based investment management and holding company with operations in the Asia-Pacific region.

Andrew Tan.bio: Andrew Lim Tan is a Chinese-born Filipino business magnate and investor. His conglomerate companies Alliance Global Group, Inc. and Megaworld Corporation presides a wide extension of business interests in real estate, liquor, casinos, high-technology, resorts, and restaurants.

Jaime Zobel de Ayala.bio: Jaime Pfitz Zóbel de Ayala, also known as Jaime Zóbel, is a Filipino businessman who was the chairman of the Ayala Corporation from 1984 to 2006, and its president from 1984 to 1994.

Tony Fernandes.bio: Tan Sri Dato' Sri Anthony Francis Fernandes is a Malaysian entrepreneur. He is the founder of Tune Air Sdn.

Low Tuck Kwong.bio: Low Tuck Kwong is an Indonesian billionaire businessman who is the founder and president director of Bayan Resources, a coal mining company in Indonesia.

Tahir.bio: Tahir & family is #304 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list. Read more about Tahir & family, their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

Peter Lim.bio: Peter Lim Eng Hock is a Singaporean business magnate who was a stockbroker and an investor in palm oil, and is now a private investor focused on healthcare, property, sports, and education.

Wee Cho Yaw.bio: Wee Cho Yaw was a Singaporean banker, businessman, investor, and philanthropist. He was chairman emeritus and honorary adviser of United Overseas Bank (UOB), and chairman of the UOL Group.

Kwong Siu-hing.bio: Kwong Siu-hing, or sometimes Kwok Kwong Siu-hing, is the matriarch of the Kwok family. She controls the conglomerate Sun Hung Kai Properties, the largest property developer in Hong Kong as of 2019.

Joseph Tsai.bio: Joseph Chung-Hsin Tsai (Chinese: 蔡崇信; Pe̍h-ōe-jī: Chhòa Chông-sìn; born January 1964) is a Taiwanese-Canadian billionaire business magnate, lawyer, and philanthropist. He is a co-founder and chairman of the Chinese multinational technology company Alibaba Group.

Cheng Yu-tung family.bio: Henry Cheng & family is #3 on Forbes' 2026 Hong Kong's 50 Richest list. Read more about Henry Cheng & family, their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

Lui Che-woo.bio: Lui Che Woo, GBM, GBS, MBE, JP was a Hong Kong business magnate, investor and philanthropist. He founded K.

Pan Sutong.bio: Pan Sutong is a Hong Kong–based businessman and investor. He is the founder of Matsunichi Digital Holdings Limited, a company involved in consumer electronics.

Lee Man Tat.bio: Lee Man Tat BBS was a Hong Kong billionaire and chairman of the family-owned Chinese sauce and condiment company Lee Kum Kee.

Cho Tak Wong.bio: Cho Tak Wong is #837 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list. Read more about Cho Tak Wong, their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

Lim Kok Thay.bio: Lim Kok Thay is a Malaysian Chinese billionaire businessman. He is the executive chairman of Genting Group, a conglomerate involved in casinos, resorts, and palm oil, with a market capitalization of nearly MYR 40 billion, and the second son of fellow billionaire Lim Goh Tong, the company's founder.

Sunil Mittal.bio: Sunil Bharti Mittal is an Indian billionaire industrialist and philanthropist. He is the founder and chairman of Bharti Enterprises.

Raj Kundra.bio: Raj Kundra is a British-Indian businessman and part time actor. He has faced legal scrutiny over allegations related to the production of adult content and involvement in sports betting.

Nikhil Kamath.bio: Nikhil Kamath is an Indian entrepreneur and investor. He is the co-founder of Zerodha, a retail stockbroker, and True Beacon, an asset management company.

Nithin Kamath.bio: Nithin Kamath is an Indian entrepreneur and the founder and chief executive officer (CEO) of Zerodha.

Ratan Tata.bio: Ratan Naval Tata was an Indian industrialist, businessman and philanthropist. He served as the chairman of Tata Group and Tata Sons from 1991 to 2012, and he held the position of interim chairman from October 2016 to February 2017.

Yusuf Hamied.bio: Yusuf Khwaja Hamied is an Indian scientist, billionaire businessman and the chairman of Cipla, a generic pharmaceuticals company founded by his father Khwaja Abdul Hamied in 1935.

Falguni Nayar.bio: Falguni Sanjay Nayar is an Indian billionaire businesswoman, who is the founder and CEO of the beauty and lifestyle retail company Nykaa, formally known as FSN E-Commerce Ventures which is an acronym of her own name.

Harsh Mariwala.bio: Harsh Mariwala is an Indian entrepreneur, who is the founder and Chairman of Marico, a Fortune India 500 company from Gujarat.

Zhou Hongyi.bio: Zhou Hongyi is a Chinese billionaire entrepreneur. He is the co-founder, chairman and CEO of the Internet security company Qihoo 360.

Liang Wengen.bio: Liang Wengen is a Chinese entrepreneur who founded and is the chairman of Sany Heavy Industry.

Huang Wei.bio: Wei-Hwa Huang (born August 4, 1975 in Eugene, Oregon) is an American puzzler, member of the US Team for the World Puzzle Championship, and game designer. Huang was a member of the United States International Math Olympiad team in 1992 and 1993, where he was awarded a Silver Medal both years.

Li Zhenguo.bio: Li Zhenguo is a Chinese billionaire and businessman, the founder and the president of LONGi Green Energy Technology, which specializes on photovoltaic solar modules.

Cao Dewang.bio: Cao Dewang, also known as Cho Tak Wong or Tak Wong Cho, is a Chinese entrepreneur. He is the chairman of Fuyao Group, one of the largest glass manufacturers in the world.

Zuo Hui.bio: Zuo Hui was a Chinese entrepreneur, real estate tycoon and founder of KE Holdings.

Charles Bronfman.bio: Charles Bronfman, is a Canadian-American businessman and philanthropist and is a member of the Canadian Jewish Bronfman family. With an estimated net worth of $2.5 billion in 2023, Bronfman was ranked by Forbes as the 1,217th wealthiest person in the world.

Galen Weston Jr.bio: Willard Gordon Galen Weston was a British-Canadian billionaire businessman and Chairman Emeritus of George Weston Limited, a Canadian food processing and distribution company.

Chip Wilson.bio: Dennis J. "Chip" Wilson is an American-Canadian businessman, investor, and philanthropist who has founded several retail apparel companies, most notably the yoga-inspired athletic apparel company Lululemon Athletica.

Anthony von Mandl.bio: Anthony von Mandl is #730 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list. Read more about Anthony von Mandl, their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

Tobias Lutke.bio: Tobias Lütke is a German Canadian entrepreneur and racing driver who is the co-founder and CEO of Shopify, an e-commerce company based in Ottawa, Ontario, Canada.

Garrett Camp.bio: Garrett Camp is a Canadian-French businessman, investor, and software engineer. He helped build the search engine StumbleUpon and is a co-founder of Uber.

Hansjorg Wyss.bio: Johann Georg "Hansjörg" Wyss is a Swiss billionaire businessman and donor to politically liberal and environmental causes in the United States. He is the founder and former president and chairman of Synthes, a medical device manufacturer.

Jorge Moll.bio: Jorge Neval Moll Filho (born January 23, 1946) is a Brazilian cardiologist and entrepreneur. He founded Rede D'Or, which is one of the largest Brazilian hospital and lab operators.

Carlos Alberto Sicupira.bio: Carlos Alberto Sicupira & family is #588 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list. Read more about Carlos Alberto Sicupira & family, their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

Vicky Safra.bio: Vicky Safra is a Greek-born billionaire and member of the Safra family.

Andre Esteves.bio: André Santos Esteves is a Brazilian billionaire businessman. Among Brazilian billionaires, Esteves is ranked second with a net worth of US$19.4 billion, according to Forbes, as of March 2026.

Luiza Trajano.bio: Luiza Helena Trajano Inácio Rodrigues is a Brazilian businessperson. She is chair of the retailer Magazine Luiza and associated companies.

Alejandro Santo Domingo.bio: Alejandro Santo Domingo is a Colombian American businessman who manages the Santo Domingo Group, his family's conglomerate.

Horst Paulmann.bio: Horst Paulmann Kemna was a German-Chilean billionaire businessman. He was the founder and chairman of Cencosud, the largest retail chain in Chile and the third largest in Latin America.

Graeme Hart.bio: Graeme Richard Hart is a New Zealand billionaire businessman and is among the country's richest persons. As of June 2024, his net worth was estimated at NZD$12.1 billion.

Frank Lowy.bio: Sir Frank P. Lowy is an Australian and Israeli businessman and the former long-time chairman of Westfield Corporation, a global shopping centre company with US$29.3 billion of assets under management in the United States, United Kingdom and Europe.

Harry Triguboff.bio: Harry Oskar Triguboff is an Australian billionaire real estate developer, and one of Australia's richest people.

Mike Cannon-Brookes.bio: Michael Canon-Brookes is an Australian businessman who is the co-founder and chief executive officer of the software company Atlassian, a Forbes Global 2000 company.

Scott Farquhar.bio: Scott Farquhar is an Australian businessman who is the co-founder and the former co-chief executive officer of software company Atlassian.

Clive Palmer.bio: Clive Frederick Palmer is an Australian billionaire businessman and politician. He has iron ore, nickel, and coal holdings, and owns various mining and resort businesses.

Anthony Pratt.bio: Anthony Joseph Pratt is an Australian businessman. He is the chairman of Pratt Industries and Visy, the world's largest privately owned packaging and paper company.

Ivan Glasenberg.bio: Ivan Glasenberg is a South African business executive and former chief executive officer of Glencore, one of the world's largest commodity trading and mining companies.

Lars Windhorst.bio: Lars Windhorst is a German entrepreneur and co-founder of Sapinda Group. He is best known for being the owner of fashion company La Perla.

Theo Albrecht Jr.bio: Theodor Paul Albrecht was a German entrepreneur. He established the discount supermarket chain Aldi with his brother Karl Albrecht.

Karl Albrecht Jr.bio: Karl Hans Albrecht Jr. is a German billionaire, and the son of Karl Albrecht, who founded the discount supermarket chain Aldi with his brother Theo.

Heinz Hermann Thiele.bio: Heinz Hermann Thiele was a German businessman and the chairman of Knorr-Bremse AG, a German automobile brakes manufacturer, and chairman of Vossloh, a German transport technology manufacturer.

Georg Schaeffler.bio: Georg Schaeffler is #144 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list. Read more about Georg Schaeffler, their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

Hubert Burda.bio: Hubert Burda is a German billionaire publisher. He is the owner, publisher and general partner of Hubert Burda Media, a global media company of more than 600 media products, including websites, print magazines and other brands.

Eyal Ofer.bio: Eyal Ofer is an Israeli billionaire, philanthropist and art collector, based in Monaco. Born in Israel, he is involved in real estate, energy, technology and shipping.

Idan Ofer.bio: Idan Ofer is an Israeli billionaire businessman and philanthropist, with interests in shipping, energy, mining and sports.

Stef Wertheimer.bio: Stef Wertheimer was an Israeli billionaire industrialist, investor, philanthropist and politician. He was a member of the Knesset, and was known for founding industrial parks in Israel and neighboring countries.

Shari Arison.bio: Shari Arison is an American-born Israeli businesswoman and philanthropist. She is the owner of Arison Investments, which consists of several companies, and of The Ted Arison Family Foundation, which comprises several philanthropic organizations that operate as its subsidiaries.

Mohammed Al Amoudi.bio: Mohammed Hussein Ali Al Amoudi (Arabic: محمد حسين علي العمودي; born 21 July 1946) is an Ethiopian-born Saudi billionaire businessman. Born in Ethiopia to a Yemeni father from Hadhramaut and a mother from Wollo Province, he migrated to Saudi Arabia with his brother Mauricet and became a Saudi citizen.

Majid Al Futtaim.bio: Majid Al Futtaim was an Emirati billionaire businessman, and the founder and owner of the Majid Al Futtaim Group, an Emirati real estate and retail conglomerate, with projects in Asia and Africa.

Micky Arison.bio: Micky Arison is an Israeli-American billionaire businessman and chairman of Carnival Corporation, the world's largest cruise operator.

Shahid Khan.bio: Shahid Rafiq Khan is a Pakistani and American businessman. He owns the Jacksonville Jaguars of the National Football League (NFL) and Fulham F.C.

Stephen Ross.bio: Stephen Michael Ross (born May 10, 1940) is an American real estate developer, philanthropist, and sports team owner.

Donald Bren.bio: Donald Leroy Bren is an American billionaire businessman. He is the chairman and owner of the Irvine Company, a U.S. real estate development corporation.

John Menard Jr.bio: John Robert Menard Jr. (born January 22, 1940) is an American billionaire businessman who is the founder and owner of Menards, a Midwestern chain of home improvement stores.

James Packer.bio: James Douglas Packer is an Australian billionaire businessman and investor. Packer is the son of Kerry Packer, a media mogul, and his wife, Roslyn Packer.

Richard Liu.bio: Richard Liu is #12 on Forbes' 2025 The Midas List: Top Tech Investors list. Read more about Richard Liu, their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

Wei Jianjun.bio: Wei Jianjun is a Chinese billionaire businessman who serves as chairman of Great Wall Motors, the largest Chinese SUV manufacturer.

Jiang Rensheng.bio: Jiang Rensheng is a Chinese billionaire businessman, and the chairman of Zhifei, a vaccine manufacturer.

Peter Salovey.bio: Peter Salovey is an American social psychologist and former academic administrator. He served as the 23rd president of Yale University from 2013 to 2024.

Bob Iger.bio: Robert Alan Iger is an American media executive who was the chief executive officer (CEO) of the Walt Disney Company twice, from 2005 to 2020 and from 2022 to 2026.

David Zaslav.bio: David Zaslav is an American media executive who is the current CEO and president of Warner Bros.

Sara Blakely.bio: Sara Treleaven Blakely is an American businesswoman and philanthropist. She founded Spanx, an intimate apparel company with pants and leggings, in Atlanta, Georgia.

Whitney Wolfe Herd.bio: Whitney Wolfe Herd is an American entrepreneur most notable as the founder, executive chair, and CEO of Bumble.

Judy Faulkner.bio: Judy Faulkner is #477 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list. Read more about Judy Faulkner, their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

Thai Lee.bio: Thai Lee is a Thai-born Korean-American billionaire businesswoman, the co-owner, CEO and president of SHI International, reported by Forbes to be the largest woman-owned business in the US in 2012.

Diane Hendricks.bio: Diane Marie Hendricks is an American billionaire, businesswoman, and conservative political donor. She is the widow of the late businessman Ken Hendricks.

Lynda Resnick.bio: Lynda Rae Resnick is an American entrepreneur born in 1943. She is vice-chairman of The Wonderful Company.

Stewart Rahr.bio: Stewart J. Rahr is an American entrepreneur, investor and philanthropist.

Charles Ergen.bio: Charles Ergen is #178 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list. Read more about Charles Ergen, their experience, their asset summary, and more here.

John Malone.bio: John Carl Malone (born March 7, 1941) is an American billionaire businessman, landowner, and philanthropist.

Rupert Johnson Jr.bio: Rupert Harris Johnson Jr. (born 1941) is an American billionaire businessman and philanthropist. He is the vice chairman of Franklin Resources, a global investment management firm also called Franklin Templeton Investments.
